title: Lodha & Co is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Lodha & Co is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Lodha & Co is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Aurangabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Lodha & Co:
Lodha & Co is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha & Co!
